creator: john@sanren.ac.za
text:
Created attachment 251646
port of google-earth-pro 7.3.6

Thank you for the tips Tijl.

Here is the third attempt of the google-earth-pro 7.3.6 port. All of the ports now pass poudriere testport.

At the end I moved the google-earth-pro binaries and libraries from opt/google/earth/pro/ inside compat/linux to usr/local/share/google-earth-pro, or wherever DATADIR is pointing to.
